UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Wheel of Fortune card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Wheel of Fortune card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Wheel of Fortune card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Wheel of Fortune card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Wheel of Fortune card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Wheel of Fortune card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the dynamic spin of Fortuna's wheel, symbolizing the cyclic nature of luck and change.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasising the veil or blindfold, as they represent acceptance and surrender to the cycles of fate.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Wheel of Fortune card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic, Orchestral, Harp, Strings, Flute, Mystical, Cinematic, Epic, Instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Wheel of Fortune card in an reversed position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Wheel of Fortune card in a upright position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the eternal struggle of Sisyphus, symbolizing cycles of hardship and perseverance in the face of adversity.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasising the despair or hopelessness, instead focus on the resilience and determination shown by Sisyphus.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Wheel of Fortune card in an reversed position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, ambient, ethereal, reversed, contemplative, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Wheel of Fortune card in an between position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Wheel of Fortune card in a upright and reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the tragic fate of Oedipus, the twist at the crossroads, and the prophetic sorrow in his haunted gaze.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasising the sphinx or distant oracle path as they may distract from the central theme of Oedipus' destiny.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Wheel of Fortune card in an between position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, ethereal, mystical, contemplative, building, instrumental
